title: The Legend of the Lost Dutchman's Gold Mine

scenes.text: A treasure buried in the desert has never been found.
It is believed to be located near Apache Junction, Arizona.
The Lost Dutchman's Gold Mine legend began in the 1800s and still intrigues treasure hunters.
Many have searched in vain, yet the mine remains elusive.
scenes.label: STILL ELUSIVE

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Apache Junction, USA - 1800s. The legend of the Lost Dutchman's Gold Mine has captured the imagination of treasure hunters for generations, yet it remains undiscovered. Follow for daily cold cases!
